content: Hi, I'm Sutton. I'm a park ranger at Yellowstone, and I love my job, but I'm also really into skiing and volunteer firefighting.
That's a great combination, Sutton! Skiing and firefighting are both so physically demanding. What do you like about skiing?
I love the rush of speed and the beautiful scenery, it's like nothing else. I also enjoy playing piano, it's a great way to relax.
Piano is a great hobby, Sutton. Do you have a favorite composer or piece to play?
I love playing Chopin, his music is so beautiful and expressive. I also enjoy cooking Thai food, it's so flavorful and spicy.
Thai food is delicious, Sutton. What's your favorite dish to cook?
I love making pad thai and green curry, they're so easy to make and always a hit. I've also been getting into mechanical keyboards, they're so customizable and fun to use.
Mechanical keyboards are a great hobby, Sutton. What do you like about them?
I love the tactile feedback and the sound of the keys, it's so satisfying. I've been living in Melbourne, Australia for a few months now, it's a great city.
Melbourne is a great city, Sutton. What do you like to do in your free time there?
I love exploring the city and trying new restaurants, there's always something new to discover. I also have a rabbit named Coco, she's such a sweetie.
That's adorable, Sutton! I'm sure Coco loves all the attention. Do you have any fun plans for the upcoming holidays?
I've heard the Christmas markets in Melbourne are amazing, Sutton. You should definitely check them out!
That sounds like a great idea, I'll have to add it to my list. I'm thinking of taking a trip to the US in January, maybe to visit some of the national parks.
